_metadata.export_note: Full workflow JSON available in n8n Cloud. Import via n8n UI: Workflows > Import from File. Update credentials and webhook URLs for local setup.
_metadata.local_setup_tip: Run 'npx n8n' then import this file. Update webhook base URL from rochak01.app.n8n.cloud to localhost:5678
